data.title: The cost of overlooking menopause
data.description: Overlooking menopause is costly on all fronts, including an organization's bottom line, the global economic stage and gender equity in the workplace.

data.title: Menopause in the workplace1234
data.description: Menopause in the workplace isn’t a new issue, but we now have the solutions to make a difference.
